title: GTA 6 is shaping up to be a disaster for retailers
abstract: GTA 6 is poised to be a disaster for retailers, my dear shoppers! Imagine your wallets shrinking as you get swept up in the game's latest mania. While retailers are rejoicing, you might find yourself scrambling to keep up. It’s like they’ve been given a golden ticket to success while you’re left with nothing but a sigh and a hope that you won’t be caught in the crossfire.
abstract_zh: GTA 6 准备给零售商们来个“惊喜”！这可不是什么好意，各位准备囤货的小伙伴们要注意了。想象一下，你的钱包在 GTA 的世界里瞬间瘪了一圈，而那些零售商们却笑得合不拢嘴。这波操作简直就像是把他们送上了天堂，你呢？只能默默地祈祷别被卷进风潮中。
